corpus.title: Binary candidate filter
corpus.text: Binary signatures scan a compact Hamming space first and then over-fetch candidates for exact vector reranking.

corpus.title: ITQ and PCA rotation
corpus.text: PCA chooses a real-valued projection subspace while ITQ rotates that space to reduce quantization error before taking signs.

corpus.title: Precomputed embedding artifact provenance
corpus.text: Frozen embedding fixtures record generator, model, dataset, qrels, prompt identities, normalization, dtype, and canonical hashes.

corpus.title: Dataset and qrels hashes
corpus.text: Dataset hashes protect corpus and query text. Qrels hashes protect graded relevance judgments used by retrieval evaluation.

corpus.title: Affective memory security
corpus.text: Affective memory should separate consent, sensitivity policy, emotion labels, encryption, and audit-friendly provenance.

corpus.title: Urgency based memory routing
corpus.text: Urgency-aware planners gate short, medium, long, and base memory retrieval to avoid unnecessary latency during live chat.

corpus.title: Encrypted local storage
corpus.text: AEAD encryption with a strong key derivation function protects local memory files and summaries stored on disk.

corpus.title: MDBX storage primitives
corpus.text: MDBX-backed adapters persist documents and resource manifests while keeping indexing, retrieval, and storage concerns separate.

corpus.title: BM25 lexical retrieval
corpus.text: BM25 and BM25F lexical indexes use term frequency, inverse document frequency, and length normalization for sparse retrieval.

corpus.title: Hybrid retrieval
corpus.text: Hybrid retrieval combines lexical matches, dense vector similarity, binary candidate generation, and exact reranking.

corpus.title: Header include hygiene
corpus.text: Public headers should compile independently while aggregate domain headers remain the preferred user-facing include surface.

corpus.title: Experiment notes
corpus.text: Each experiment note records the date, hypothesis, expected result, actual benchmark table, caveats, and follow-up checks.
